_audit_2026_05_01_disable_sector_rotatio.rationale: Validated-strategies audit. Disabled sector_rotation (0 trades in fresh backtest, structural mismatch with single-ETF-per-sector universe — min_sector_stocks=3 vs 1 ticker per sector). Open positions check: XLI under momentum_breakout (kept). 0 open positions on sector_rotation.

disabled.reason: Strategy fundamentally requires multi-stock sectors; sector_etfs has 1 ETF per sector. 0 trades across full backtest history.

_audit_2026_05_01_disable_sector_rotatio.follow_up: research_best for sector_etfs/mean_reversion and sector_etfs/momentum_breakout are stale (2026-04-21, P1.1 contamination era). Re-run sweeps after fixing the snapshot-required bug in research/loop.py:556 and DEFAULT_STRATEGIES in research/autoresearch_nightly.py.

candidate_config.description: Sector ETFs — PAUSED 2026-05-04 (consolidation focus on sp500). Re-enable: flip mode back to 'live' + restore crons.

_consolidation_note.decision: User-approved consolidation. Pause sector_etfs+commodity_etfs live trading; sp500 remains live. Mode=passive blocks new entries while protective infra keeps maintaining OCO brackets on remaining open positions until closure script runs.
open_positions_at_pause: XLE/momentum_breakout (8 shares @ $59.06, stop $57.56, OCO live at broker)
XLI/momentum_breakout (9 shares @ $173.97, stop $170.07, OCO live at broker)
_consolidation_note.closure_plan: scripts/consolidation_close_positions.py executes manual market-sell at next US open (2026-05-05 13:30 UTC) or operator-chosen RTH window. Cancels OCO + market sell + DB/state update.
reenable_criteria: (1) sp500 live performance shows sustained edge over 30+ trading days
(2) sector_etfs/commodity_etfs research_best Sharpe >= 0.5 with passing OOS gates 1-4
(3) Operator decision to redeploy capital across multiple universes
_consolidation_note.reversibility: Set trading.mode='live', restore cron entries (see git log around 2026-05-04 for removed lines), bump version. Heartbeat config entries preserved — re-enable services if removed.
